title: Wild West Days
writer: W.R. Burnett, Wyndham Gittens, Norman S. Hall
actors: Johnny Mack Brown, George Shelley, Lynn Gilbert
plot: Retired lawman Kentucky Wade and his three buddies, Mike Morales, "Dude" Hanford, and "Trigger" Benton come to Brimstone and help their friends Larry Munro and his sister, Lucy, in their fight to retain control of Larry's rich ore...
